insight: On Velocity, `FoundationPlayer.getServer()` can return null during join events because the player hasn't been assigned to a server yet. Any code calling `getServer().getName()` on the proxy must null-check the server first. This affects both ProxyPlayerMessage.prepareVariables() and FoundationPlaceholders' `{player_server}` placeholder. The established safe pattern is: `audience.getServer() != null ? audience.getServer().getName() : ""`.
